noteflightScore.title: Bâttlè öf thê Báñds
noteflightScore.subtitle: Nicholas Belemet, Martin He, Theo McDermott-Roberts, Druhan Mewasingh, Abhijit Shidlagatta, Vishrut Singh
noteflightScore.composer: NB, MH, TMcD, DM, AS, VS
noteflightScore.lyricist: NB, MH, TMcD, DM, AS, VS

performance.text: BATTLE OF THE BANDS - Nick Belemet, Martin He, Theo McDermott-Roberts, Druhan Mewasingh, Abhijit Shidlagatta, Vishrut Singh

expression.text: Repeat it again, with less arrogance.
Play with **evident** arrogance on an instrument you've barely acquainted yourself with
Play with the passion of a Year 7 attempting to get a merit.
